entity.summary: Cross-chain game-integrated decentralized exchange ecosystem combining token swaps, liquidity pools, and blockchain game functions across DeFi Kingdoms realms.
entity.notes: HEI models DeFi Kingdoms as one exchange entity rather than splitting Crystalvale and Serendale into separate entities. Official documentation states that DeFi Kingdoms currently operates two decentralized exchanges across DFK Chain and Kaia.

evidence.title: DeFi Kingdoms official whitepaper
evidence.notes: Official whitepaper describes DeFi Kingdoms as a cross-chain game built on a DeFi protocol with DEXs and liquidity-pool opportunities.

evidence.title: DeFi Kingdoms decentralized exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation states that DeFi Kingdoms currently has two decentralized exchanges and describes current swap and liquidity-pool functions.

evidence.title: DeFi Kingdoms DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry corroborates DeFi Kingdoms as an exchange protocol; the Crystalvale row is consolidated into the same HEI entity.
